::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 01-executive-summary.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 02-regulatory-alignment.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 03-architecture-overview.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 04-integration-model.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 05-data-and-semantics.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 06-trust-and-security.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 07-governance-and-adr.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 08-test-and-validation.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include 09-roadmap.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-glossary.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-history.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-trust-ecosystem.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-ebw-definition.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-wallet-implementation-models.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.shift-headings by=1}
{{< include appendix-adr.qmd >}}
:::
